name: kollektiv
description: Kollektiv enables anyone to setup 'RAG over your data' in 2 clicks to get access and semantic search directly from any IDEs / MCP clients. No RAG infra, no config to manage. Users can build their private knowledgebases. It's one of the first MCP servers in the world to support Oauth 2.1 for user authentication.
